description: A customer has forgotten the password for their online account and uses the website's self-service tool to reset it.

nodes.task_description: Click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page.

expected_outcome.expected: The customer is taken to the password reset page.

nodes.task_description: Enter their email address associated with the account.

expected_outcome.expected: The customer provides their email to identify their account.

nodes.task_description: The system sends a password reset link to their email. The customer clicks the link and creates a new password.

expected_outcome.expected: The customer successfully regains access to their account.
